All Features at a Glance

👥

Member Management

Centrally manage all member data. Flexible CSV imports make switching or synchronizing easy. New members can easily apply via an online application form.

📋

Work & Supervision Duty Management

Organize work duties and range supervision effortlessly. Members can view their completed work and supervision hours at any time.

🎯

Sports Area

Every member keeps a personal, digital shooting log. Progress and competition tracking can be recorded and exported as PDF.

📱

Member Portal

In the personal area, members can view their data, check work hours, and access a central document area.

📅

Event Management

Plan club events including duty rosters for smooth organization.

✉️

Communication

Reach your members quickly and easily via the integrated member mailing function.

📆

Calendar & Events

Integrated calendar for all club events, conveniently subscribable via practical ICS feeds.

📖

Free Shooting Log Generator

Use our free, standalone shooting log generator. Easily create your shooting log online according to official German shooting association standards and download it as a PDF — completely registration-free.

Create Shooting Log ↗
ℹ️

Finances

We currently deliberately do not offer financial management. Our focus is on the perfect organization of daily sporting club life.
